winners.title: Postmortem Masturbation as a Cure for Intractable Hiccups
winners.summary: A case report describing how digital rectal massage resolved a patient's intractable hiccups after other treatments failed.

winners.title: Using a Full Ponytail to Understand the Physics of Hair
winners.summary: Mathematical model of a ponytail describing how individual hairs splay outward due to the balance of elasticity, gravity, and randomness.

winners.title: Walking Backwards Improves Short-Term Memory
winners.summary: Experimental evidence that walking backwards, or even just imagining walking backwards, boosts short-term memory performance.

winners.title: Cats Act as Both Liquid and Solid
winners.summary: Investigation into the ability of cats to conform to the shape of their container, addressing the question of whether cats are liquid.

winners.title: The Screaming of Alligators
winners.summary: Alligators were shown to bellow in resonance with helium, demonstrating a way to detect the size of the vocal tract.

winners.title: Swallowing a Shrew Whole to Reconstruct Its Skeleton
winners.summary: A scientist swallowed a dead shrew and later recovered its skeleton from their own feces to study digestion-based reconstruction.

winners.title: Cannibalism Has Fewer Calories Than Eating Other Meats
winners.summary: Researchers calculated the caloric value of human body parts and found that human meat provides fewer calories than most large game animals.

winners.title: Why Do Old Men Have Big Ears?
winners.summary: A systematic study tracking ear size in elderly men confirmed that ears continue to grow throughout life, at about 0.22mm per year.

winners.title: Seeing Jesus in Toast
winners.summary: People who claim to see faces in random stimuli (pareidolia) also tend to see such faces in other objects more frequently.

winners.title: Itching on One Side of the Body Is Relieved by Looking in a Mirror
winners.summary: The rubber hand illusion was extended to show that watching a mirror-image of your body being scratched relieves an itch on the real limb.

winners.title: Reindeer Are Attracted to Men in Polar Bear Costumes
winners.summary: An experiment in which researchers dressed in polar bear costumes and observed the reactions of reindeer in Norway.

winners.title: Birthday Congratulations Extend Lifespan
winners.summary: Statistical evidence that people are less likely to die just before their birthday, suggesting psychological will to live to milestones.
